meta.trigger_event: Scheduled daily run — no new evidence ingested

scenarios.label: 持久消耗战：弹药耗尽驱动的强制均衡
premises: 盟军防空弹药在W3-5触及物理极限（H2/H4）
伊朗无人机成本非对称持续有效（$3.5K vs $1-3M）
美国国内伤亡敏感度随时间上升
没有可签约的对手方（H1承诺悖论）
scenarios.antithesis: 如果美国切换到进攻性摧毁发射场策略而非逐个拦截，弹药耗尽时钟将被重置；或伊朗无人机供应链被有效切断。
open_questions: 拦截率跌破85%的确切时间窗口
美国是否会从拦截转向先发制人打击发射场
伊朗无人机零部件库存深度

scenarios.label: 谈判暂停：第三方斡旋达成临时停火
premises: 中国或土耳其提供可信斡旋渠道
双方国内聚旗效应开始消退
油价冲击迫使海湾国家施压
伊朗内部出现可签约的替代权威
scenarios.antithesis: H1承诺悖论指出唯一可签约者已被消灭，莫杰塔巴尚未整合IRGC。无可信签约方使谈判无法落地。内塔尼亚胡已公开承诺政权更迭，观众成本锁死退路。
open_questions: 美国大选周期是否创造谈判窗口

scenarios.label: 地面战升级：美军地面部队介入
premises: 美军阵亡人数突破政治阈值
巴格达使馆袭击构成casus belli
五角大楼战争开支已超$50亿形成沉没成本
聚旗效应尚在高位，总统需要'决定性胜利'
scenarios.antithesis: 伊拉克/阿富汗创伤记忆使地面战在国内极度不受欢迎；五角大楼高层可能以预算约束为由阻止；伊朗纵深过大，地面作战目标不明确。
open_questions: 美军阵亡数字的政治爆发阈值
伊朗常规军vs IRGC的防御协调度

scenarios.label: 滞胀螺旋：能源危机触发全球经济衰退
premises: 油价维持>$85超过6周（H3触发条件）
科威特产量削减+霍尔木兹海峡航运保险崩溃
供应链级联传导至化工/农业/制造业
美债从避险转为滞胀定价
scenarios.antithesis: 美国战略石油储备释放+沙特增产可部分对冲；市场可能已过度定价冲突溢价（反身性高点后回调）；冲突若在W6前降级则油价回落。
open_questions: 中国是否释放战略储备配合

bottlenecks.label: 盟军防空弹药库存触及临界点
伊朗IRGC指挥权交接/莫杰塔巴整合
霍尔木兹海峡航运保险崩溃
美军阵亡数突破国内政治阈值
内塔尼亚胡政权更迭公开承诺锁定

equilibria.label: 莫杰塔巴成功整合IRGC，成为新决策核心
IRGC高级军官集体领导，绕过政治层
聚旗效应持续，公众支持继续作战
阵亡人数触发反战浪潮
聚旗效应缓慢衰减，渐进式压力
重新定义'政权更迭'为'去IRGC化'以创造台阶

horizon_theses.thesis: 防空弹药耗尽时钟进入倒计时关键窗口，冲突烈度维持高位但拦截率开始下降。油价维持高位，航运保险市场功能性冻结。
horizon_theses.tradeable_as: long crude oil, long defense sector, short gulf airlines
horizon_theses.key_assumption: 伊朗无人机攻击频率维持当前水平或上升
horizon_theses.kill_condition: 美国成功摧毁>60%伊朗无人机发射设施，或伊朗主动降低攻击频率

horizon_theses.thesis: 弹药耗尽迫使战略调整——要么升级为地面行动（S3），要么被迫接受更高伤亡率进入消耗战平衡。滞胀定价确认（H3），美债收益率上行+权益下跌同步。
horizon_theses.tradeable_as: long gold, long vol, short UST duration, long energy vs short tech
horizon_theses.key_assumption: 没有出现可信谈判渠道；弹药补给无法在6周内到位
horizon_theses.kill_condition: 第三方成功斡旋停火协议，或美国国会通过紧急弹药生产法案大幅缩短补给周期

horizon_theses.thesis: 冲突进入结构性僵局或升级为更广泛的区域战争。全球经济进入滞胀周期，供应链永久性重构开始。避险资产范式完成切换。
horizon_theses.tradeable_as: long commodities basket, long CHF/JPY, short EM debt, long infrastructure/reshoring
horizon_theses.key_assumption: 冲突持续超过4个月且无停火迹象
horizon_theses.kill_condition: 达成全面停火协议，或伊朗政权内部崩溃导致冲突单方面终止

positions.sizing_note: 核心仓位，3-5%风险预算。W1-5窗口内逐步建仓。
positions.linked_thesis: W1_5 防空弹药耗尽时钟
positions.entry_condition: Brent维持>$85，航运保险费率继续上升

positions.sizing_note: 2-3%风险预算，作为滞胀对冲核心配置
positions.entry_condition: 10Y UST收益率突破4.8%且SPX同步下跌
positions.stop_condition: 实际利率大幅上行（Fed激进加息超预期）

positions.sizing_note: 1-2%风险预算，通过期货或反向ETF表达
positions.entry_condition: CPI连续2月超预期+油价维持>$90
positions.stop_condition: 地缘风险骤降触发避险买盘回归

positions.sizing_note: 1%风险预算，尾部对冲。到期选择W8-12。
2%风险预算，受益于弹药补给需求
positions.entry_condition: 五角大楼紧急采购订单确认

triggers.signal: 莫杰塔巴公开讲话或IRGC指挥层人事变动
triggers.condition: 莫杰塔巴发表全国讲话或被任命为IRGC最高指挥官
triggers.action: 上调S2权重，评估谈判可能性

triggers.signal: 美军阵亡人数官方公告
triggers.condition: 单周美军阵亡>15人或累计>50人
triggers.action: 上调S3权重，评估地面战升级概率
确认滞胀定价范式切换，加仓gold/short duration

triggers.signal: 美国/中国战略石油储备释放公告
triggers.condition: SPR释放>3000万桶或中国协同释放
triggers.action: 减仓crude oil多头，评估反身性回调

triggers.condition: AUMF投票启动或总统请求战争授权
triggers.action: 大幅上调S3权重，增加vol多头

trade_level.condition: 停火协议达成或Brent跌破$78持续3日
地缘风险骤降触发flight-to-quality，10Y收益率单日下行>20bp

scenario_level.premise_broken: 美国成功在W3内摧毁>60%伊朗无人机发射设施
scenario_level.evidence: 卫星图像确认伊朗无人机基地大规模毁伤

scenario_level.premise_broken: 莫杰塔巴被暗杀或IRGC公开拒绝任何谈判

regime_level.contradiction: 所有关键战略行为者同时丧失决策能力（例如伊朗政权崩溃+美国政府瘫痪），使冲突从博弈论框架退化为纯粹的机械传播

models_loaded.input_summary: No new evidence; prior SHS + DAG state ingested for scenario weight maintenance
models_loaded.output_summary: Scenario weights held stable: S1=0.42, S2=0.15, S3=0.23, S4=0.20. No Bayesian update triggered (no new evidence).

models_loaded.input_summary: Audit all scenarios with weight>0.2; mandatory audit S1 (0.42)
models_loaded.output_summary: S1 antithesis strengthened: offensive strike on launch sites could reset ammo clock. S3 antithesis: Iraq/Afghan memory as constraint. S4: SPR release as circuit breaker. No weight change warranted without new evidence.

models_loaded.input_summary: 4-order causal chain from ammo depletion through escalation pathways
models_loaded.output_summary: Identified 4th-order cascade: ammo depletion → lower intercept rate → higher civilian casualties → accelerated global antiwar pressure → potential forced negotiation. But H1 blocks negotiation endpoint.

IRGC factional fragmentation identified as Schelling focal (no single leader = default equilibrium). Netanyahu pledge locked at 0.82 commitment score — focal point is 'locked escalation'. US casualty threshold: rally fatigue is latent focal but not yet triggered.

models_loaded.input_summary: Netanyahu regime change pledge; IRGC command succession commitment dynamics
models_loaded.output_summary: Netanyahu exit_cost_ratio=4.5 (extremely locked). IRGC succession commitment_score=0.3 (low — no actor can credibly commit). US administration commitment moderate (0.55) with election cycle creating time pressure.

models_loaded.input_summary: US domestic casualty threshold; Netanyahu public pledge
models_loaded.output_summary: US audience cost rising but below critical threshold. Netanyahu audience cost maximal — any walk-back would be politically fatal. Iran audience cost low (authoritarian regime) but IRGC internal legitimacy matters.

divergence_flags.model_a_says: 4th-order cascade leads to forced negotiation through civilian casualty pressure
divergence_flags.model_b_says: H1 commitment paradox blocks negotiation endpoint — cascade leads to acceptance of higher casualties instead

shs_writeback.trigger_reason: No new evidence on IRGC succession. Schelling-commitment model confirms low commitment score (0.3) for succession — paradox remains active. Holding confidence.
No new evidence on ammo stocks or intercept rates. Mechanical propagation holds baseline. nth-order model confirms cascade pathway intact.
No new oil price or UST data. 6-week trigger condition (T4) not yet met. Holding.

Consistent with H2. DIV1 divergence noted but unresolved — nth-order sees forced negotiation, dialectic sees acceptance of casualties. Both pathways consistent with ammo depletion being the binding constraint.

payload.label: 伊朗无人机零部件供应链深度

graph_proposals.justification: nth-order reasoning identified drone supply chain sustainability as a critical unknown that mediates the ammo depletion clock. If Iran's supply chain is shallow, the asymmetry reverses. Currently no node captures this.

payload.label: 美国/中国协同战略石油储备释放

graph_proposals.justification: S4 antithesis identifies SPR release as primary circuit breaker for stagflation spiral, but no DAG node currently represents this intervention pathway.
